title: Day of the Dead (Zombie Apocalypse)
description: zombie apocalypse with guns in loot tables, so go explore not grind on resources.
body:
"Day of the Dead" is a thrilling Minecraft modpack that plunges players into a world overrun by zombies, where survival hinges on cunning, combat prowess, and strategic looting. Set in a post-apocalyptic landscape teeming with undead hordes and treacherous environments, players must scavenge, explore, and fortify their way to survival.


Scour abandoned buildings, loot chests, and scavenge resources to gather essential supplies for survival. Discover hidden bunkers, underground tunnels, and forgotten ruins filled with valuable loot, weapons, and equipment to aid in your fight against the undead.


Construct fortified bases and strongholds to shelter from the relentless zombie hordes. Design intricate defense systems, lay traps, and fortify your walls to withstand the onslaught. Expand your base, recruit survivors, and establish a thriving community in the midst of chaos.


mods credits: (Sebastian Siljuholtet Johansen) maker of 
https://modrinth.com/mod/electrodynamics
https://modrinth.com/mod/nuclear-science
https://modrinth.com/mod/ballistix
https://modrinth.com/mod/modular-force-field-systems
https://modrinth.com/mod/blastcraft
